name: Intuneomator
description: Intuneomator is a macOS enterprise tool that automates Microsoft Intune app lifecycle management, leveraging Installomator’s 900+ label database for multi-arch apps. It enables end-to-end workflows (download, package, upload, deploy), group targeting, metadata and script automation, plus Teams-based status and CVE alerts. Built with a secure XPC architecture, keychain-backed credentials, and dual authentication for enterprise-grade security.
keywords: how to automate mac app uploads
author: Gil Burns

securityCheck.aiSummary: The codebase contains eval-based dynamic loading of label data, and mechanisms capable of downloading/executing components from remote sources, which pose legitimate security risks if inputs are not strictly validated and signed. Additionally, programmatic modification of build phases could be abused in CI environments. Mitigations include avoiding eval on untrusted data, strict validation and signing of downloaded artifacts, whitelisting allowed URLs, and auditing build-phase injections.
